## What changed

- 

## Content type

- [ ] Course or resource catalog update
- [ ] Question / explanation correction
- [ ] UI or interaction change
- [ ] Documentation / maintenance update

## Quality checklist

- [ ] Student-facing routes stay clear and do not expose maintainer-only material.
- [ ] New resources are added to `data/resource_catalog.js`.
- [ ] New resources have entries in `data/resource_quality.js`.
- [ ] Content follows `docs/content_quality_rubric.md`.
- [ ] Local state keys are documented if this change writes to `localStorage`.
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes.

## Notes for reviewers

Mention source material, pages checked, and any known uncertainty.
